sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, json_column JSON, xml_column XML, value DECIMAL(10,5), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, json_column, xml_column, value) VALUES (1, '{"key1": "value1", "key2": null}', '<root><item>Data</item></root>', 123.45678);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, json_column, xml_column, value) VALUES (2, '{"key1": "value2", "key2": "extra"}', '<root><item>More Data</item></root>', 0.00001);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, json_column, xml_column, value) VALUES (3, '{"key1": "value3", "key2": "<xml><nested>test</nested></xml>"}', '<root><item>Data</item></root>', -99999.99999);
SELECT json_array_length(json_column) AS json_length, XMLType.toObject(xml_column) AS xml_object FROM test_data WHERE value > 100 AND json_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, json_array_length(json_column) AS json_length FROM test_data WHERE value = 0.00001 UNION ALL SELECT id, json_array_length(NULL) FROM test_data WHERE xml_column IS NULL;
SELECT t.id, json_array_length(t.json_column) AS json_length FROM test_data t JOIN test_data t2 ON t.id = t2.id WHERE t2.value < -100000 ORDER BY json_length DESC;
SELECT id, XMLType.toObject(xml_column) AS xml_object FROM test_data WHERE value IN (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) HAVING json_array_length(json_column) < 3;

WITH json_counts AS (SELECT id, json_array_length(json_column) AS count FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1) SELECT j.id, XMLType.toObject(t.xml_column) FROM json_counts j INNER JOIN test_data t ON j.id = t.id WHERE j.count = (SELECT MAX(count) FROM json_counts);
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value, COUNT(*) AS total FROM test_data WHERE json_array_length(json_column) < 2 GROUP BY json_column HAVING total > 0;
